MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey Masi appearing in propria persona 806-6717, moving to set aside default and vacate judgment
* No other appearance on this matter. Defendant's handwritten declaration of service was ordered filed by the clerk.
** The Court granted defendant's motion to vacate and set aside default judgment. Defendant's proposed answer was deemed the answer and filed as of this date. ORDER to vacate was SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DG/301) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
